title: Building SnakeByte
content: SnakeByte was created around the simple idea that classic arcade gameplay still works well on modern mobile devices.
The goal was to keep the controls simple, the sessions quick, and the gameplay focused on score chasing and replayability.
Rather than overcomplicating the design, SnakeByte keeps the focus on fast decisions, clear movement, and that classic feeling of trying to beat your previous score.
